# Prof. Christian Farioli

> AI Strategist, Educator, Speaker, Author & Advisor. Helping leaders and organizations navigate artificial intelligence with clarity, strategy, and human-centered wisdom. 20,000+ executives trained across 4 continents; 500+ global organizations.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://christianfarioli.com/): AI strategy, keynote speaking, executive advisory and corporate training.
- [Insights](https://christianfarioli.com/insights/): Articles on AI strategy, AI leadership, AI marketing, AISO, executive education, future of work, and advanced digital-marketing strategies.
- [Testimonials](https://christianfarioli.com/testimonials/): What executives and leaders say about working with Prof. Christian Farioli.
- [Past Events](https://christianfarioli.com/past-events.html): Keynotes, conferences and trainings delivered worldwide.

## Topics / expertise
AI Strategy, AI Leadership, Generative AI, AI Search Optimization (AISO), Digital Marketing, SEO, Executive Education, Future of Work, Keynote Speaking.
